message:
fix(tests): migrate toml::Value→toml::Table document parsing, classify 13 new test files

The toml 1.0.1+spec-1.1.0 crate changed Value::from_str to parse single
values instead of full TOML documents. All test files parsing
suite_classification.toml via parse::<toml::Value>() silently failed or
panicked. Migrate to parse::<toml::Table>() for document-level parsing.

Also: add 13 unclassified test files to suite_classification.toml, remove
phantom graduated_rollout_sec72 entry, and fix clippy absurd_extreme_comparisons
in scheduler.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
